programs.title: Chain Reaction
programs.sub_title: Writing Divas vs. Theme Park Squad
programs.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programs.title: America Says
programs.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programs.title: America Says
programs.sub_title: Color Guard Crew vs. Fantastic Educators
programs.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programs.title: The Chase
programs.sub_title: Guess They Don't Teach Math at Harvard
programs.desc: James Holzhauer returns as the featured chaser, facing off in a battle of wits against a social services program manager, a game designer and a technology executive.

programs.title: The Wall
programs.desc: Husband and wife Tiffany and CJ from Levittown, Pa., both police officers, have dedicated their lives to the community; the two take on the new Superdrop in hopes of conquering the wall.

programs.title: Press Your Luck
programs.desc: Contestants from Dana Point, Calif.; Lancaster, Calif.; and Northridge, Calif.
